name: Poppy Seed Tea Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease two 7-1/2 x 3-3/4 x 2-1/4-inch loaf pans (with a capacity of 3-1/2 cups).
2. In a large bowl, beat butter, sugar, baking powder, and salt with an electric mixer on medium speed for 3 minutes or until fluffy.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time. Beat in milk and vanilla extract until blended (batter may appear curdled). With the mixer on low speed, beat in flour and poppy seeds just until blended (batter will be thick).
4. Divide batter evenly between prepared pans and spread it out.
5. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes or until a pick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow cooling in the pans on a wire rack for 10 minutes before transferring to a rack to cool completely. Store airtight.
